login.title: Sign In
login.subtitle: Sign in to join GlueCrypt
login.restore_access: To restore access to your account, scan or import a QR code
login.pin_notice: Remember, we may require a 6-digit PIN code to use your QR code.
login.decrypt_subtitle: Enter your 6-digit PIN to unlock credentials.
login.wait_message: This may take a few seconds, thank you for your patience!
login.error_message: Failed to log in, please try again. If the problem persists, it is likely on our side :\

footer.description: Secure and anonymous data encryption tool using AES.
